children.heading: Effect on regulations
children.label: c Effect on regulations
children.text: Regulations issued under the authority of a provision of law repealed by subsection (a) shall remain in effect until such time as the Secretary issues a regulation under that supersedes the earlier regulation.1section 7754 of this titleSee Codification note below.1
